vulnerabilities.description: X-Powered-By header exposes information about the used framework to potential attackers
Hardcoded database password in DB_CONFIG object

Expensive operation (a file system operation) is performed by an endpoint handler which does not use a rate-limiting mechanism. It may enable the attackers to perform Denial-of-service attacks. Consider using a rate-limiting middleware such as express-limit.

Expensive operation (a file system operation) is performed by an endpoint handler which does not use a rate-limiting mechanism. It may enable the attackers to perform Denial-of-service attacks. Consider using a rate-limiting middleware such as express-limit.
Unsanitized req.query.name interpolated directly into HTML response
User-controlled req.query.filename appended to base path without normalization
User-controlled req.query.host concatenated into shell command passed to exec()
